title: nepeta nuda subsp. latifolia
intro: Nepeta nuda subsp. latifolia, also known as Naked Catmint or Woolly Catmint, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily its essential oils, which contain compounds like nepetalactone and geraniol, that have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta nuda subsp. latifolia include relief from anxiety and insomnia due to its calming properties, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and ease muscle spasms. Nepeta nuda subsp. latifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
